case_title: OSCARTIELLE EQUIPMENT CO INC VS LINCE ED DBA LINCE BEVERAGE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,149.77 FILED BY OSCARTIELLE EQUIPMENT CO INC AS TO DEFENDANT LINCE ED DBA LINCE BEVERAGE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-30-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
